description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a dark gray exterior and a prominent hip roof covered in slate-like shingles. The front facade features three garage doors at ground level, a covered balcony with railings above, and a main entryway set to the right with an arched overhang. Windows are symmetrically placed on the front and side elevations, with a mix of single and double-pane styles. The driveway is wide and extends in front of the garages, with a small step leading to the main entrance. The house is constructed primarily from wood framing and concrete, with visible siding and a shingled roof, and likely includes interior spaces such as living areas, bedrooms, and a garage.
description: A two-story suburban house with a dark gray exterior, hip roof, three-car garage, and a covered balcony above the main entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing three garage doors, a covered balcony with railings, main entryway with an arched overhang, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid dark gray siding, a small window, and the driveway extending to the side.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wall, dark gray siding, and a small utility box near the ground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing two windows, the side of the balcony, and the driveway extending to the right.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched main door with a covered porch, steps, and balcony above
